title: rhododendron subarcticum
intro: Rhododendron subarcticum, also known as the Arctic rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant that is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron subarcticum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for its medicinal uses.
